source_book_title: Buster the Noodle Head Dog Goes to Bed

Character_Buster.description: Buster, a small black-and-white mixed dog with a round silly face, bright curious eyes, floppy ears, and a slightly goofy 'noodle head' expression; energetic jumper who moves like a frog; later wears matching black-and-white dog pajamas.
Character_Buster.voice_profile: Non-verbal dog: short playful yips, soft whines, happy pant-breaths, and sleepy snuffles; medium-high pitch, quick excited energy when awake, slow soft breaths when drowsy; same dog voice every scene.

Character_Mom.description: Warm, patient mother in cozy evening home clothes (soft sweater or robe), kind face, gentle hands; the household adult who guides Buster's bedtime routine.
Character_Mom.voice_profile: Adult woman, warm mid-range pitch, calm unhurried pace, soft American accent, affectionate energy with mild firmness on rules; same voice every scene.

Character_Daddy.description: Quiet father figure already in or near the parents' bed in evening clothes or sleepwear; soft presence, minimal dialogue, welcoming to the dog.
Character_Daddy.voice_profile: Adult man, low-mid pitch, soft quiet evening energy, slow relaxed pace, mild American accent; same voice every scene.

Character_Narrator.description: Off-screen storyteller presence only; not a visible on-screen person unless a brief title-card illustration style is used. Warm children's-book reader.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Adult storyteller, friendly mid pitch, clear playful cadence that can rhyme, gentle smile in the voice, unhurried children's-book energy; same voice every scene.
